Class Animate

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.image.ImageView
Main.Animation.Animate
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class Animate extends javafx.scene.image.ImageView
A sprite animation manager that handles multiple animation states such as Idle, Run, JumpUp-Down, Skill, and others. The class controls the frame sequence of each animation state, adjusts animation speed depending on the current state, and invokes DrawAnimation() to render the sprite accordingly. The animation system uses a sprite sheet where each animation state is stored in a different row.

  • Field Details

    • currentRow

      protected int currentRow
      Current animation row in the sprite sheet.

    • currentFrame

      protected int currentFrame
      Current frame index being displayed in the animation.

    • accumulator

      protected double accumulator
      Accumulates delta time for frame switching.

  • Constructor Details

    • Animate

      public Animate(javafx.scene.image.Image image, int idle, int run, int jumpUp, int jumpDown, int doubleJump, int die, int slide, int takeDamage, int skill, int frameWidth, int frameHeight)
      Creates a sprite animation manager. This animation controller manages multiple animation states such as Idle, Run, JumpUp-Down, Skill, and others. It controls the frame sequence for each state, adjusts animation speed depending on the current state, and calls DrawAnimation() to render the sprite frame.
      Parameters:
      image - sprite sheet image used for animation
      idle - number of frames in the idle animation
      run - number of frames in the run animation
      jumpUp - number of frames in the jump up animation
      jumpDown - number of frames in the jump down animation
      doubleJump - number of frames in the double jump animation
      die - number of frames in the die animation
      slide - number of frames in the slide animation
      takeDamage - number of frames in the take damage animation
      skill - number of frames in the skill animation
      frameWidth - width of each frame in the sprite sheet
      frameHeight - height of each frame in the sprite sheet

  • Method Details

    • update

      public void update(double deltaTime)
      Updates animation timing and moves to the next frame based on accumulated delta time.
      Parameters:
      deltaTime - time passed since the previous update

    • setFrameDuration

      public void setFrameDuration(float frameDuration)
      Sets the duration each frame will be displayed.
      Parameters:
      frameDuration - duration of a single animation frame

    • DrawAnimation

      public void DrawAnimation()
      Updates the viewport of the ImageView to display the correct frame from the sprite sheet.

    • changeAnimationState

      public void changeAnimationState(AnimationType state)
      Changes the current animation state and resets the current frame.
      Parameters:
      state - new animation state

    • getAnimationState

      public AnimationType getAnimationState()
      Returns the current animation state.
      Returns:
      current animation state
